title: Portable Declarative Contracts and Agent-Native Alignment
goal: Define a machine-readable "Cold-Start" Protocol for immediate agent orientation.
Align `execplan` and `summary` schemas with agent-native planning structures.
Inventory and extract lifecycle truths from Python into declarative manifests.
non_goals: Inventing a new workflow language or generic automation system.
Replacing human-legible documentation entirely with JSON.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Consolidate agentic-workspace CLI and operating model by aligning repository planning contracts with agent-native reasoning structures.
intent_continuity.parent lane: Portable declarative contracts and agent-native alignment

required_continuation.activation trigger: Completion of the first implementation slice.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: High-signal cold-start orientation and machine-readable startup protocol.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Extraction of broader lifecycle logic (beyond startup) into the manifest.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Need for stricter `TODO.md` and `execplan` parsing to ensure high-quality structured output.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: Verified integration with a simulated fresh agent.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: Aligning `summary` fields and extracting more lifecycle truth.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: A working "Cold-Start" protocol and aligned summary schemas that reduce agent startup friction.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Maintain zero-warning repository health; avoid breaking existing human-legible surfaces.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Local implementation details of CLI flags and JSON structures.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Proposed changes would break backward compatibility in a way that blocks other active lanes.

active_milestone.scope: Define protocol in manifest, implement --startup flag, and update summary fields.

immediate_next_action: None; this implementation slice is complete.
invariants: `agentic-workspace report --startup` must always return high-signal orientation context.
Schema changes must be backward-compatible or explicitly noted as breaking.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: The `startup-report/v1` schema is now the canonical cold-start entrypoint.
open_questions_to_close: Should we also extract `setup` and `init` lifecycle logic into the manifest in this slice? (No, deferred to next slice).
completion_criteria: `agentic-workspace report --startup` returns a valid, high-signal JSON block.
`agentic-workspace summary` includes Requested Outcome, Hard Constraints, and Escalation Boundaries.

proof_report.validation proof: `uv run agentic-workspace report --startup --format json`; `uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json`; `make check`.
proof_report.proof achieved now: startup-report output is present and stable (`startup-report/v1`), and summary/report surfaces expose aligned planning contract projections.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: full repo checks pass with startup report and planning summary contracts active.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: define a machine-readable startup protocol and align summary/report planning contracts with agent-native execution framing.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: startup-report and planning summary/report contract fields are present and validated in workspace checks.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: startup report and planning summary now expose aligned, high-signal contract fields for agent-native startup and handoff.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: `uv run agentic-workspace report --startup --format json`; `make check`; `cd packages/planning && uv run pytest -q`.
execution_summary.follow-on routed to: future lifecycle extraction slices only when additional declarative surfaces are intentionally promoted.
execution_summary.resume from: extend manifest-driven lifecycle extraction only if a new lane explicitly requires it.

drift_log: 2026-04-19: Initial plan created for portable contracts and agent-native alignment.
2026-04-19: Aligned plan with TEMPLATE.md for better tool integration.
2026-04-19: Filled out required sections to satisfy planning checker.
2026-04-20: Completed startup-report/summary alignment validation and closed this implementation slice.
